voiceScripts.customerInitial: Hi {{callerName}}, this is {{businessName}}. We received your request about the {{issueType}} issue and we're reaching out to our on-call team right now. Someone should be calling you back shortly.
voiceScripts.customerAccepted: Hi {{callerName}}, this is {{businessName}} calling back about your {{issueType}} emergency. Good news — we've got a tech heading your way.{{etaText}} They'll call you when they're close. Is there anything else you need before they arrive?
voiceScripts.customerSubDispatched: Hi {{callerName}}, this is {{businessName}} calling back. We've arranged a service partner to assist you tonight with your {{issueType}} issue. They should be reaching out to you shortly.
voiceScripts.customerUnavailable: Hi {{callerName}}, this is {{businessName}} calling back about your {{issueType}} request. Unfortunately we weren't able to reach any of our on-call techs tonight. If this is still urgent, you can call our direct line at 587-809-6383. We really apologize for the inconvenience.
voiceScripts.customerSubCancelledTechAssigned: Hi {{callerName}}, this is {{businessName}} with an update. Good news — one of our own techs is now heading your way for your {{issueType}} issue.{{etaText}} They'll call you when they're close.
voiceScripts.subCancellation: Hi, this is {{businessName}} dispatch. We had a service request we'd reached out about, but one of our techs is now available to cover it. You're off the hook — sorry for the back and forth.

intakeFields.label: Callback number
intakeFields.helpText: Best number for the tech to reach them back.

intakeFields.label: Service address
intakeFields.helpText: Where the work needs to happen.

intakeFields.label: Area
intakeFields.helpText: Neighbourhood or area of Fort McMurray.

intakeFields.label: Summary
intakeFields.helpText: What is happening — furnace out, pipes burst, etc.

intakeFields.label: Notes
intakeFields.helpText: Dogs, locked gate, which door — anything the tech should know.

messageTemplates.slackSummary:
<!channel> *New dispatch request*
Customer: {{callerName}}
Callback: {{callbackNumber}}
Location: {{locationArea}}
Issue: {{issueType}}
Urgency: {{urgency}}
Summary: {{summary}}
Job ID: {{jobId}}
messageTemplates.techSms: Dispatch request {{jobId}}: {{issueType}} at {{locationArea}}. {{summary}} Reply YES if you can take it, NO if not.
messageTemplates.partnerSms: Partner request {{jobId}}: {{issueType}} at {{locationArea}}. {{summary}} Reply YES if available.
messageTemplates.subcontractorSms: Service partner request {{jobId}}: {{issueType}} at {{locationArea}}. Please call back to confirm availability.
